/clang64/bin/c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--enable-auto-import CMakeFiles/test.dir/decode/autf8.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/decode/base64.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/decode/beastSound.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/decode/binary.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/decode/edcrypt.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/decode/zhtopy.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/fft/fft.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/method/bindkernel.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/sql/baseSqlite3.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/sql/sqlite3.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/main.cpp.o -o test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  log/liblog.dll.a -ldl -lpthread
